proven.smt2:
; LINE: 97  ; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Arithmetic Safety (non‑negative counters)
(declare-const totalSignals Int)
(declare-const fileCount Int)
; Transitions:
;   totalSignals starts 0 and only ever adds signals.length (≥0)
;   fileCount starts 0 and only increments by 1 when a file has ≥0 signals
(assert (>= totalSignals 0))
(assert (>= fileCount 0))
; Negated property: a counter becomes negative
(assert (or (< totalSignals 0) (< fileCount 0)))
(check-sat)                               ; unsat → counters stay ≥0
